scripts.publish-packages: turbo run build && pnpm publish -r --access public --no-git-checks
scripts.publish-jsr: node scripts/sync-jsr-versions.mjs && pnpm -r --filter @napplet/core --filter @napplet/nap --filter @napplet/sdk --filter @napplet/shim --filter @napplet/vite-plugin exec npx jsr publish --allow-slow-types --allow-dirty
